# verify-ci-cd-deployment
Description: Verify if a code change deployed automatically via a CI/CD pipeline after a push to the main branch.
Source: project
1. Push the code changes to the main branch of the repository.
2. Confirm that the push operation was successful.
3. If a CI/CD pipeline is configured for the repository, it should automatically detect the push to the main branch.
4. Monitor the CI/CD pipeline's status to ensure it triggered and completed successfully.
5. Verify that the changes are live in the target environment after the pipeline finishes.
